name: @monet/desktop
description: Monet as a transparent, always-on-top desktop being. An Electron shell over the whiteroom app's /desktop route (overlay mode), with a BYOK brain (your own Anthropic key, held only in the main process).

scripts.build:native: swiftc -O ax/monet-axread.swift -o ax/monet-axread && swiftc -O ocr/monet-ocr.swift -o ocr/monet-ocr
scripts.postinstall: npm run build:native || echo 'skip native build (no swiftc) — screen-read disabled'
